prose:
The Fukui reactivity indices for furan were computed using Density Functional Theory (DFT) with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier `standard`, density-fit) in PySCF. The calculation was performed in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The geometry was taken from the user-provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz` file and used as-is for this single-point calculation.

**Fukui Indices per Atom:**

| Atom Index (1-based) | Symbol | f+ (Electrophilic) | f- (Nucleophilic) | f0 (Radical) | Dual Descriptor (f2) |
|----------------------|--------|--------------------|-------------------|--------------|----------------------|
| 1                    | O      | -1.3316            | 0.0838            | -0.6239      | -1.4154              |
| 2                    | C      | 1.2287             | 0.0891            | 0.6589       | 1.1396               |
| 3                    | C      | 1.2270             | 0.0893            | 0.6582       | 1.1377               |
| 4                    | C      | 1.9233             | 0.1615            | 1.0424       | 1.7618               |
| 5                    | C      | 1.9243             | 0.1616            | 1.0430       | 1.7627               |
| 6                    | H      | -1.2191            | 0.1025            | -0.5583      | -1.3215              |
| 7                    | H      | -1.2191            | 0.1025            | -0.5583      | -1.3216              |
| 8                    | H      | -0.7668            | 0.1048            | -0.3310      | -0.8716              |
| 9                    | H      | -0.7667            | 0.1048            | -0.3310      | -0.8715              |

The most electrophilic site is Carbon atom 5 (1-based index) with an f+ index of 1.9242931.
The most nucleophilic site is Carbon atom 5 (1-based index) with an f- index of 0.1616371.

The calculation log is being written live to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp9nxf1_z3/live.json`.
